name: libqt6bluetooth6
title: libqt6bluetooth6
description:
Qt 6 Connectivity Bluetooth library
Qt is a cross-platform C++ application framework. Qt's primary feature
is its rich set of widgets that provide standard GUI functionality.
.
This package contains the Bluetooth part of the Qt 6 Connectivity library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libqt6bluetooth6 because Qt 6 Connectivity Bluetooth library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libqt6bluetooth6 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libqt6bluetooth6 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libqt6bluetooth6 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
